<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-māu]][[de:Metall-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de métal]][[hak:Sîn-mâu]][[ja:辛卯]][[ko:신묘]][[nds:Metall-Haas]][[uk:Темний металевий заєць]][[vi:Tân Mão]][[za:Sinmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-báu]][[zh-yue:辛卯]][[zh:辛卯]]

'''Yin Metal Rabbit''', also known as '''Shinbō''' (辛卯, Kanotō, Shinkin no Usagi, Shinkin no U, Shinbō), is one of the elements in the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 28th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following [[Yang Metal Tiger]] and preceding [[Yang Water Dragon]]. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Kanoto (辛)]] corresponds to Yin [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Rabbit (zodiac)|Rabbit (卯)]] corresponds to Yin [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], creating a [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]] (Metal overcomes Wood) relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Rabbit (辛卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 maau5
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Shinkin-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: shinmi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmyo (신묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mão

==Years of Yin Metal Rabbit==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 31 are considered Yin Metal Rabbit years.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of the Yin Metal Rabbit'''
|-
![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]]
|-
|
* [[31]]
* [[91]]
* [[151]]
* [[211]]
* [[271]]
* [[331]]
* [[391]]
* [[451]]
* [[511]]
* [[571]]
* [[631]]
* [[691]]
* [[751]]
* [[811]]
* [[871]]
* [[931]]
* [[991]]
|
* [[1051]]
* [[1111]]
* [[1171]]
* [[1231]]
* [[1291]]
* [[1351]]
* [[1411]]
* [[1471]]
* [[1531]]
* [[1591]]
* [[1651]]
* [[1711]]
* [[1771]]
* [[1831]]
* [[1891]]
* [[1951]]
|
* [[2011]]
* [[2071]]
* 2131
* 2191
* 2251
* 2311
* 2371
* 2431
* 2491
* [[2551]]
* 2611
* [[2671]]
* [[2731]]
* [[2791]]
* [[2851]]
* 2911
* 2971
|}

==Months of Yin Metal Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Kanoto (辛)]] or [[Hinoe (丙)]]), the [[February]] of that year is considered a Yin Metal Rabbit month. However, this applies to the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]], and in some cases, the [[Solar term]] (from [[Jingzhe]] to the day before [[Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.

==Days of Yin Metal Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Metal Rabbit days are the 8th day of the [[Ten directions]] cycle.

== References ==

==See Also==
<!--Yin Metal Rabbit--><!--Yin Metal Rabbit-->

{{wikidata link|Q1062275}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
